title: artemisia campestris subsp. glutinosa
intro: Artemisia campestris subsp. glutinosa, also known as sweet sagewort or glutinous sage, is a plant species within the genus Artemisia, belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Artemisia campestris subsp. glutinosa include relief from digestive issues, reduced inflammation, and alleviation of respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. This plant can be used to prepare various herbal remedies, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties.
